applicantName.description: Full name of the primary applicant

loanCategory.description: Product type: 'Auto', 'Personal', 'Small Business', 'Other' — only if explicitly indicated

loanPurpose.description: Stated purpose, e.g. 'finance a used 2024 Honda CR-V', 'debt consolidation'

itemDescription.description: Description of the item or need being financed, e.g. vehicle year/make/model

purchasePrice.description: Price of the item being financed in USD, plain numeric

downPayment.description: Down payment offered in USD, plain numeric

requestedLoanAmount.description: Requested loan amount in USD; only if explicitly stated — do not compute price minus down payment

grossAnnualIncome.description: Gross annual income in USD, plain numeric

totalMonthlyDebts.description: Sum of monthly liabilities explicitly listed in the source

notes.description: Data found with no matching schema field, conflicts between sources, or wrong-product observations

missingFields.description: Names of schema fields not found in the envelope; never invent values for these

extractionConfidence.description: Overall extraction completeness and clarity, 0.0-1.0; 0.9+ only when the request was clearly a loan inquiry with most fields present

dateOfBirth.description: Applicant's date of birth as stated in the source

taxpayerId.description: Applicant's taxpayer ID / SSN as stated in the source

currentAddress.description: Applicant's current residential address (distinct from the subject property address)
